ideation: This sequence mimics the action of picking up a paperclip, starting with both arms relaxed and ending with one arm holding it. The sequence emphasizes the precision and care involved in handling a small object. Frame 1 shows both arms at rest. Frame 2 shows the right arm extending and the left arm gently moving aside. Frame 3 showcases the right arm reaching downward toward the paperclip. Frame 4 shows the right arm lifting the paperclip, with the left arm remaining slightly out of the way. Frame 5 shows both arms returning to a neutral posture, with the right arm holding the paperclip near the robot's body.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, ready for a task
the right arm begins to extend, left arm moves aside
right arm reaches down, preparing to grasp
right arm lifts the paperclip carefully
both arms return to rest, holding the clip
